data.title: Xilio Therapeutics to present at SITC 40th Annual Meeting on Nov 6-9, 2025 at Gaylord National Convention Center. #immunotherapy #biotech
data.description: Xilio Therapeutics, Inc., a biotechnology company based in Waltham, Massachusetts, revealed today that they will be presenting various posters at the upcoming Society for Immunotherapy of Cancer (SITC) 40th Annual Meeting. The event is scheduled to occur between November 6 and 9, 2025, at the Gaylord National Convention Center in National Harbor, Maryland. Xilio Therapeutics, Inc., listed on Nasdaq as XLO, focuses on developing immuno-oncology therapies that target tumors. The company will be showcasing their work at multiple presentations during the conference.

data.title: BioAtla will present clinical data for BA3011 in Soft Tissue Sarcoma at SITC 2025. Meeting held from Nov 5-9 in MD.
data.description: A biotechnology company, BioAtla, Inc. (Nasdaq: BCAB), recently shared news on their development of Conditionally Active Biologic antibody therapeutics for treating solid tumors. The company announced that clinical data on their AXL-targeting antibody-drug conjugate, mecbotamab vedotin (BA3011), will be unveiled at the Society for Immunotherapy of Cancer (SITC) 2025 Annual Meeting in National Harbor, MD from November 5-9, 2025. This presentation will feature insights into the investigational ADC's efficacy and potential impact on cancer treatment.

data.title: Verizon Business and GE Vernova partner to offer utilities grid modernization solutions with MDS™ Orbit powered by Verizon.
data.description: The GE Vernova MDS™ Orbit, in partnership with Verizon, has been launched and is accessible for utilities seeking to supervise, manage, and streamline their electrical grid and additional infrastructure.

data.title: GoldHaven starts first diamond drilling in Brazil to test gold targets; 1200m program underway at Copeçal Gold Project.
data.description: A diamond drill program of 1200 meters has commenced at the Copeçal Gold Project.

Syria interior ministry: 'The Criminal Investigation Branch in Hama Governorate arrested a thief after receiving a report from a Lebanese citizen that a group was involved in robbing her home in Lebanon, and that one of its members had fled to Syria.'

data.title: Riot reveals latest production and operations updates for September 2025. #gaming #news
data.description: According to recent reports, the global unemployment rate has reached 5.7%, with approximately 190 million people currently without a job. This increase is largely attributed to the ongoing economic effects of the pandemic, leading to job losses across various industries worldwide. The situation is particularly concerning for young people, as the youth unemployment rate stands at 13.1%. Experts suggest that coordinated efforts and policy interventions are necessary to stabilize the job market and support individuals seeking employment opportunities during these challenging times.

data.title: Increase in workers resorting to pay-advance apps for basic expenses indicates financial strain, not satisfaction - report.
data.description: According to a recent report, a surge in usage of applications does not necessarily indicate contentment. The author of the report has noted that individuals who heavily use these apps are facing financial difficulties.

data.title: InRetail Shopping Malls starts tender offer for all 5.750% Senior Notes due 2028. Trustee is Internacional de Títulos.
data.description: On October 3, 2025 in Lima, Peru, a Peruvian trust named Patrimonio en Fideicomiso, under D. Leg. No. 861, which is not registered with the SMV, is targeting institutional investors. Operated by Internacional de Títulos Sociedad Titulizadora S.A., the trust is focused on InRetail Shopping Malls.

data.title: STMicroelectronics schedules Q3 2025 earnings release and conference call.
data.description: Yesterday, it was reported that the global tally of confirmed coronavirus cases has surpassed 10 million, with over 500,000 deaths worldwide. The United States remains the most affected country, with over 2.5 million confirmed cases and more than 125,000 deaths. Brazil and Russia follow closely behind, each with over 1 million cases. In response to the rising numbers, many countries have implemented strict measures such as lockdowns and travel restrictions to curb the spread of the virus. Experts warn that without continued efforts to control the pandemic, the numbers could further escalate in the coming weeks.

data.title: UK demands Apple grant access to encrypted iCloud backups, risking crypto wallet security for British users.
data.description: The United Kingdom has issued a directive to Apple to grant access to encrypted iCloud backups for its British users. This decision has the potential to make crypto wallet keys susceptible to hacking.
US Labor Sec. Chavez-Deremer concludes remarks on Fox Business.

data.title: Armitron and Peanuts collaborate for 50th and 75th anniversaries with an exclusive collection. NYC, Oct. 3, 2025.
data.description: Armitron and Peanuts® are joining forces to commemorate two significant milestones, highlighting 50 years of Armitron and an undisclosed number of years for Peanuts. The collaboration aims to honor their mutual dedication to creativity, expertise, and lasting influence across generations. The partnership will result in a special release that showcases the essence of both brands. This exciting venture was officially announced in New York on October 3, 2025.

data.title: JScreen, TODAY Show, and Mount Sinai team up for cancer genetic screening event in honor of Breast Cancer Awareness Month with 350 participants.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, in New York City, a significant event took place to commemorate Breast Cancer Awareness Month. The event known as Pink Power Hour was hosted by jscreen.org, a non-profit organization that offers genetic testing services, in collaboration with Myriad Genetics and Mount Sinai Cancer Center. The event was held at Rockefeller Plaza and saw the participation of 350 individuals.

data.title: Augusto Valverde, Global Child founder, honored with invite to explore Saudi Arabia's Aseer Region, the "Kingdom of Hospitality."
data.description: On October 3, 2025, in Miami, it was announced by Global Child: Travel & Purpose that its esteemed host, Augusto Valverde, was invited as a guest to the stunning Aseer Region of Saudi Arabia, recognized as the "Kingdom of Hospitality."

data.title: John E. Anderson III promoted as Business Leader for Gilbane Building in New Jersey; a privately-owned firm - Oct. 3, 2025.
data.description: In Newark, New Jersey, on October 3, 2025, Gilbane Building revealed the appointment of John E. Anderson III to oversee its operations in the state. As a sixth-generation member of the Gilbane family, Anderson's promotion signifies the company's commitment to maintaining family leadership. Gilbane Building, a major player in the construction sector, stands as one of the largest privately-owned firms in the industry. This move underscores their focus on continuity and succession within the organization.

data.title: Canadian plant-based cleaner Leaf & Mineral coming to US, offers efficacy of traditional soaps, eco-friendly. Accessible in US soon.
data.description: A new product called Leaf & Mineral is set to launch in the United States, offering the effectiveness of traditional soaps while also being environmentally friendly. The announcement was made in Fort Lauderdale, Florida on October 3, 2025. The product aims to address the ongoing discussion about the environmental impact of cleansing products. This innovative offering seeks to cater to American consumers who are increasingly conscious about the ecological footprint of the products they use.

data.title: Investors who lost money in C3.ai (NYSE: AI) urged to contact Wolf Haldenstein due to securities lawsuit. Deadline: October 21, 2025. Join the case now.
data.description: The deadline for the lead plaintiff in the securities class action lawsuit against C3.ai, Inc. (NYSE: AI) is October 21, 2025, as per Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP. Interested investors can find more information and join the case by clicking on the provided link. The lawsuit concerns allegations related to the Company, with important details to be addressed within the specified timeframe.
